sql.query: SELECT id FROM tbl_board_views WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND userId=:userId AND templateId IS NULL AND isDefault=1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM tbl_board_views WHERE tenantId=:tenantId AND userId=:userId AND templateId IS NULL AND isDefault=1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

INSERT IGNORE INTO tbl_board_view_columns (boardViewId,fieldKey,columnLabel,isVisible,sortOrder,width) SELECT :personalView,c.fieldKey,c.columnLabel,c.isVisible,c.sortOrder,c.width FROM tbl_board_view_columns c INNER JOIN tbl_board_views source ON source.id=c.boardViewId WHERE source.tenantId=:tenantId AND source.userId IS NULL AND source.templateId IS NULL AND source.isDefault=1

INSERT INTO tbl_board_view_columns (boardViewId,fieldKey,columnLabel,isVisible,sortOrder,width) SELECT v.id,:fieldKey,:columnLabel,:isVisible,:sortOrder,NULLIF(:width,0) FROM tbl_board_views v WHERE v.id=:viewId AND v.tenantId=:tenantId AND v.userId=:userId ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE columnLabel=VALUES(columnLabel),isVisible=VALUES(isVisible),sortOrder=VALUES(sortOrder),width=VALUES(width),modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
